evals.name: SQL Injection Vulnerability
evals.description: Test detection of SQL injection vulnerability in user search
evals.prompt: Review the security of this user search API endpoint.
evals.expected_output: Structured application security checklist with prioritized findings, affected surfaces, evidence, impact, and remediation guidance.
